title: oberonia gammiei
intro: Oberonia gammiei, also known as Gammie's orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats in India. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which provide its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Oberonia gammiei include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to prevent chronic diseases and infections. Oberonia gammiei is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
